mapper.select: SELECT * FROM memo WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM memo WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM memo WHERE status IN (0, 1) AND is_reminded = 0 AND remind_time IS NOT NULL AND remind_time <= #{now}
SELECT * FROM memo WHERE status = 0 AND due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < #{now}
